description_long: This is a compact, rectangular microwave oven with a sleek, modern design. The front features a large, flat metallic door with a vertical handle on the right side, and a control panel situated to the right of the door. The control panel includes several colored buttons and a digital timer display, with clear labeling for time settings. The top, sides, and back of the microwave are solid and unadorned, finished in a dark, glossy material. There are no visible vents or windows on any surface, giving the appliance a minimalist appearance. The overall look is utilitarian, suitable for placement in urban kitchens, break rooms, or communal spaces.
description: A modern, boxy microwave oven with a metallic door, vertical handle, and a side control panel featuring colored buttons and a digital timer. The exterior is dark and glossy, with no visible vents or windows.
description_view_0: The front view shows the metallic door, vertical handle, and a detailed control panel with colored buttons and a timer display.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, solid dark surface with no features or openings.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a flat, unadorned dark surface, with no visible vents or access panels.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a featureless, dark surface.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring several rectangular buttons in green, red, orange, and black, with a digital timer display labeled 'Timer 5 10 30'. The buttons are arranged in a column, with clear color differentiation and labeling for ease of use.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a vertically oriented, slightly curved bar located on the right edge of the door. It appears to be made of plastic or metal, is integrated into the door's design, and is sized for a comfortable grip.
attribute_vent_placement: No visible vents or ventilation openings are present on any surface of the object.
